name: unmarshal_no_state_validation
code:
proof fn phi_5_unmarshal_no_state_validation(obj: DynamicObjectView)
    requires
        obj.kind == PodView::kind(),
        PodView::unmarshal_spec(obj.spec) is Ok,
        PodView::unmarshal_status(obj.status) is Ok,
    ensures
        PodView::unmarshal(obj) is Ok,
{
}
reason: unmarshal succeeds whenever kind/spec/status parse correctly but never calls state_validation — objects violating domain invariants (e.g. pod with spec == None) can be successfully unmarshalled
